entries.title: AidData
entries.description: Visualizing flows of financial aid donated to countries by international organizations and by other countries. In collaboration with AidData.org.

entries.title: ColumnFlow
entries.description: Reusable React component for column-organized node-link graphs.

entries.title: Election fraud
entries.description: Visualizing traces of fraud in Russian presidential election in 2012 and estimating the amount of fraud.

entries.title: Flow map user study
entries.description: User study on visualizing temporal changes in flow maps

entries.title: Flowstrates
entries.description: An interactive technique for analyzing temporal changes in origin-destination data, that is, flows of entities between geographic locations.

entries.title: Street Flow
entries.description: Visualizing people passing by ATMs in Zurich

entries.title: NZZ Summer Series: Swiss maps
entries.description: A series of twenty visualizations for Neue Zürcher Zeitung  telling stories about Switzerland.

entries.title: TeraTransport
entries.description: An exploratory tool for the analysis of geographic movement of people.

entries.title: NZZ: History of WW1
entries.description: An interactive storytelling piece for Neue Zürcher Zeitung  engaging the audience to explore the events of the World War I.

entries.title: DataVis with React talk at OpenVis conf
entries.description: I had the great pleasure to speak at the OpenVis conference about  using React for Data Visualization.
